subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Zahra Bagum
subcodes.first_line: O ye Leaves of My Divine Lote-Tree! Upon ye be the Glory of God, the Lord of both worlds. O ye fruits of My Tree of Bounty! Upon ye rest the Light of God, the Luminous, the Radiant, the Effulgent!
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اوراق سدرتی علیکن بهاء الله رب العالمین یا اثمار شجر عنایتی علیکن نور الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for forgiveness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @personal instructions
